features: ARTIFICIAL FALL LEAVES: When the leaves change color and fall from the trees, autumn has arrived. The decorative oak leaves on the branch are slightly wavy and attractive gradient colors from a lighter color at the base to a rich color at the tip. This warm color scheme gives a sense of full harvest, perfect for finishing off any fall-themed display

REALISTIC DESIG: The oak leaves are meticulously crafted and arranged in an alternating pattern, featuring vibrant veins that intricately replicate the natural details found in real foliage, realistic touch and vibrant colors. Fall branches oak leaves stems for vases fill your home with the charm of autumn and nature

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: The oak leaves artificial are made of high quality silk satin, fall leaves stems are made of plastic with iron wires wrapped in, durable and bendable.The flexible oak leaves branches can be placed in the window at home or in the shop window of your shop to spread the autumn mood

IDEAL SIZED AUTUMN LEAVES: The package includes 3 pieces of artificial oak leaves with stems. The height of each stem is around 35 inches. Create a cozy autumn atmosphere in your home with this flexible and bendable Fall Oak Leaf stems Faux Foliage Spray.TIPS: silk greenery stems are bended packaged, carefully please gently adjust stems, fake leaves to reshape your desired appearance

MULTIPURPOSE ACCENTS: You can pair these faux fall stems with other flower materials, such as dried flowers. Fall stem are perfect for homes, wreaths, bouquets, vases in bedrooms, weddings, and various festive scenes. Fall branches for vase also an excellent gift for friends and family, bringing them joy during holidays while expressing your love and blessings
